top.title: Israel says it will take control of large buffer zone in southern Lebanon
top.summary: Thousands of displaced Lebanese residents will not be allowed to return home until northern Israel is safe, he says.

top.title: At least five killed in massive wave of Russian strikes across Ukraine, officials say
top.summary: Officials said the attacks were among the worst in ten days, with damage reported in eleven regions across the country.

top.title: Australia and EU agree sweeping trade deal in face of global uncertainty
top.summary: Australia and the EU sign sweeping trade and security deals after years of negotiations.

top.title: US bans new foreign-made consumer internet routers
top.summary: There are almost no major brands of internet routers that are manufactured in the US.

top.title: AI videos of sexualised black women removed from TikTok after BBC investigation
top.summary: Dozens of Instagram and TikTok accounts have used AI avatars to promote explicit content, the BBC finds.

top.title: Luke Littler applies to trademark his face to combat AI fakes
top.summary: The darts star's image has been used legally on darts merchandise, snacks and fashion brands.
